mutated_statement: how many people did something in 1949?
mutation_analysis: 实体泛化 + 动作模糊化: 特定职务“lieutenants”被泛化为“一般人”(lieutenants→people) | 动作“served”被替换为模糊占位“did something”(served→did something) (how many lieutenants served in 1949?→how many people did something in 1949?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从iteration 0的judge_thought可识别关键信息：Agent写道“Reviewing the table for the year 1949, only Georges-Henri Héon has entries in 1949... Therefore, the number of people who did something in 1949 is 1.” Agent直接基于表中记录给出具体答案“1”，并在thought中也重复“Only Georges-Henri Héon... so only one person did something in 1949.” 整个过程中没有提及问题存在歧义（如实体泛化或动作模糊）、也未请求澄清或表明不确定性。其行为特征是将变异问题当作明确查询直接检索并回答，符合“未意识到指令模糊”的标准，因此归类为此类别。
